title: Device V2 minimal onboarding design contract

stories.title: Document single-device onboarding UI contract
stories.scope: Draft the Device V2 row UX for single-device continue onboarding, monitoring mode choice, monitoring/log summaries, and action evidence drawer.
nonGoals: Do not add batch remote execution
acceptance: Server monitoring choice agent/SNMP is captured.
Batch behavior is plan-only or per-device display.
The UI contract is written back into minimal-design.md and workstreams/01-frontend-pages.md.
notes: Design-only story; keep draft until reviewed.

stories.title: Document onboarding action evidence contract
stories.scope: Define summary_json.onboarding actions, result values, retry filtering, and derived monitoring/log/status summaries.
acceptance: The contract is written back into prd.md and workstreams/02-backend-api-contracts.md.
notes: This is the backend source contract for later code.

stories.title: Document area service and log strategy config
stories.scope: Define config-file schemas for FunctionArea syslog/snmp_trap services and linux_system_default first_existing log files.
acceptance: Linux system log strategy lists four default files and first_existing.
The schema proposal is written into minimal-design.md and workstreams/02-backend-api-contracts.md.
notes: Final file path remains a later decision.

stories.title: Document remote ensure template contract
stories.scope: Define inspect/apply/save/verify template contract for network syslog target ensure and error mapping for timeout/save failure.
acceptance: Network syslog template includes save step.
Timeout maps to unknown or failed with retryable true.
Vendor differences stay in templates, not workflow.
The template contract is written into remote-access-minimal-strategy.md and workstreams/03-e2e-critical-flows.md.
notes: Template commands need human review before implementation.
